title: Code Review Findings（code review findings）
description: 用于 code review sub-agents 的 structured output schema

reviewer.description: 生成此 output 的 persona name（例如 'correctness'、'security'）

findings.description: 此字段包含 code review findings 的列表。未发现 issues 时为空数组。

title.description: 简短、具体的 issue title。10 words or fewer。

severity.description: 此 issue 的 severity level

file.description: 相对于 repository root 的 file path

line.description: 此 issue 的 primary line number

why_it_matters.description: 影响和 failure mode -- 不是 'what is wrong'，而是 'what breaks'

autofix_class.description: 这是 review 后给 caller 的 routing hint（此 skill 不 apply fixes）。gated_auto = 已提出 concrete suggested_fix，caller 判断后 apply；manual = 需要 design 或 cross-cutting decisions；advisory = report-only。

owner.description: 说明 synthesis 后谁应负责此 finding 的 next action

requires_verification.description: 此 finding 的任何 fix 是否必须用 targeted tests 或 follow-up review pass 重新验证

suggested_fix.description: 这是 reviewer 能从 diff 和 surrounding code 中 defend 的 concrete minimal fix。只要 review context 中能触达任何 defensible code change（parallel patterns、framework conventions 或 cited code itself），就提出一个。信息不完整不是省略理由 -- 基于你能看到的内容提出最 defensible default，说明你的 assumption，并允许 user override。'I need <specific input> to commit' 是 soft punt：真正的问题是 '如果现在必须选择，我会提出什么 code change?'，请提出它并说明 assumption。只有在确实没有 code-level change 可提出时才省略 -- 例如 finding 是 question 而非 fix（'what is the intended SLA here?'），或 resolution 纯属 organizational action 且没有 code component（legal sign-off、business policy decision）。这些情况在 code review 中很少见。糟糕 suggestion 仍比没有 suggestion 更差，但 soft punt 正是此 field 要防止的 failure mode。

confidence.description: 锚定式 confidence score。必须准确使用 0、25、50、75、100 之一。每个 anchor 都有 reviewer 必须诚实 self-apply 的 behavioral criterion。0：Not confident。这是 false positive，经不起轻度检查，或是此 PR 未引入的 pre-existing issue。25：Somewhat confident。可能是真 issue，也可能是 false positive；reviewer 仅凭 diff 和 surrounding code 无法 verify。50：Moderately confident。reviewer 已验证这是真 issue，但可能只是 nitpick、narrow edge case，或 practical impact 很小。相对于 diff 的其他 concerns，它不太重要。Style preferences 和 subjective improvements 属于这里。75：Highly confident。reviewer 已 double-check diff，并确认 issue 会在 normal usage 中影响 users、downstream callers 或 runtime behavior。bug、vulnerability 或 contract violation 清晰存在且 actionable。100：Absolutely certain。issue 可直接从 code 本身验证 -- compile error、type mismatch、definitive logic bug，或带可引用 rule 的 explicit project-standards violation。无需 interpretation。

evidence.description: Code-grounded evidence: snippets, line references, or pattern descriptions. At least 1 item. For any finding at confidence anchor 75 or 100, the first item MUST be the verbatim motivating line(s) with file:line -- the exact code text that makes the finding true (the quote-the-line gate). A finding whose triggering line cannot be quoted must step down to anchor 50. When the finding's claim depends on line history (pre_existing, intentional design, introduced-by-this-diff, or P0/P1 confidence that depends on authorship/age), include one additional concise provenance line from targeted git blame/log (short hash, author, date/subject) -- never replace the quote-the-line item, never dump full-file blame, omit when the finding is justified from the diff alone.

pre_existing.description: 如果此 issue 存在于与 current diff 无关的 unchanged code 中，则为 true

residual_risks.description: 这是 reviewer 注意到但无法确认成 findings 的 risks

testing_gaps.description: 这是 reviewer 识别出的 missing test coverage

confidence_anchors.description: 此处的 confidence 是 5 个 discrete anchors 之一（0、25、50、75、100），每个 anchor 都绑定 reviewer 可诚实 self-apply 的 behavioral criterion。Float values（例如 0.73）无效 -- model 无法在更细 granularity 上 meaningful calibrate，discrete anchors 可防止 false-precision gaming。
confidence_anchors.0: False positive 或 pre-existing -- 不 report
confidence_anchors.50: 已 verify 为真实但 minor 或 stylistic -- 仅当 P0，或 synthesis route 到 advisory/soft buckets 时 report
confidence_anchors.75: Highly confident，会在 normal usage 中影响 users 或 runtime -- report
confidence_anchors.100: 仅凭 code 即可 verify（compile error、type mismatch、definitive logic bug、quoted standards violation）-- report

confidence_thresholds.suppress: 低于 anchor 75 -- 不 report。例外：anchor 50+ 的 P0 findings 可以 report（critical-but-uncertain issues 不能被 silently dropped）。
confidence_thresholds.report: Anchor 75 或 100 -- 带 full evidence include。

severity_definitions.P0: Critical breakage、exploitable vulnerability、data loss/corruption。merge 前必须 fix。
severity_definitions.P1: High-impact defect，normal usage 中很可能触发，breaking contract。应 fix。
severity_definitions.P2: 有 meaningful downside 的 moderate issue（edge case、perf regression、maintainability trap）。如果 straightforward 就 fix。
severity_definitions.P3: Low-impact、narrow scope、minor improvement。由 user discretion 决定。

autofix_classes.gated_auto: 已提出 concrete suggested_fix。caller 可在 judgment 后 apply -- 不是由此 skill apply。
autofix_classes.manual: 需要 design decisions 或 cross-cutting changes 的 actionable issue。
autofix_classes.advisory: 仅用于 report 的 informational 或 operational item。

owners.downstream-resolver: Caller 或 human 应在 review 后 act。

return_tiers.description: Finding fields are split into two tiers. The full schema (with all required fields) applies to the artifact file on disk. The compact return to the orchestrator omits detail-tier fields. Both are valid uses of this schema in different contexts.
return_tiers.merge_tier: Returned to orchestrator: title, severity, file, line, confidence, autofix_class, owner, requires_verification, pre_existing, suggested_fix (optional), first_evidence (required for anchor 75/100; the verbatim first evidence line, used to enforce the quote-the-line gate in-band). Plus top-level reviewer, residual_risks, testing_gaps.
return_tiers.detail_tier: Required in artifact file, omitted from compact return: why_it_matters, and the full evidence array (the compact return carries only first_evidence). The artifact file must pass full schema validation including all required fields. Headless output depends on why_it_matters and evidence being present in the artifact.
